texts.t002: Motorised aluminium louvered pergolas, retractable membrane roofs and windproof zip screens — engineered outdoor comfort for restaurants, terraces and villas.
texts.t011: Rotating aluminium louvers with rain sensing, LED lighting and integrated drainage.
texts.t012: Sliding membrane/polycarbonate roofs that open terraces to the sky in seconds.
texts.t013: Windproof zip-guided fabric screens for sun, rain and insect protection on open sides.
texts.t014: Can the pergola handle Mumbai monsoon?
texts.t015: Yes — louvers close to a sealed roof with gutter drainage, and zip screens are wind-tunnel-rated for guided fabric systems.
texts.t023: GI, aluminium, polycarbonate & India's only 100% Indian-make full-length transparent shutter.
texts.t024: Rapid roll PVC doors up to 100 RPM-class SIE40–SIE100 motors for hygiene, logistics and cold chain.
